turn_info.content: I do not know for sure where to start. If I try to tell her that is not what I mean it is like she doesn't understand?

turn_info.content: For example today I was just saying I like the food she had cooked us for supper. She took that to mean I never liked the food she made before. She says I do not appreciate her and I should be grateful to have her.

turn_info.content: I will try this. It is worth a shot. We can't go through life being upset at each other.

turn_info.content: I appreciated the help. I was just so upset. I didn't want to talk to anyone in our family and have them take sides or make them uncomfortable.
